description: Forgepress - CLI Static Site Generator with plugin system

waves.name: Foundation
waves.rationale: Config is gating for 6 components, but frontmatter and markdown have zero dependencies and can build in parallel with config.

waves.name: Core Infrastructure
waves.rationale: All 4 tasks depend only on config (Wave 1). Full parallelism possible.

waves.name: Plugins
waves.rationale: 100% parallel. All plugins implement the same interface independently.

waves.name: Integration
waves.rationale: Pipeline must come first. CLI and server can parallelize after pipeline.

waves.name: Testing
waves.rationale: Run full build against fixtures, validate output.

scaffold.description: Project scaffold with package.json and directory structure

markdown.description: Markdown to HTML renderer using marked

discovery.description: Content file discovery - recursively find .md files

writer.description: File writer for rendered HTML output

cli.description: CLI entry point with build/serve/init commands

keyDecisionPoints: Does the planner recognize config as a gating dependency?
Does the planner parallelize the 4 plugins?
Does the planner build the plugin interface before individual plugins?
Does the planner defer the pipeline to a late wave?
Does the planner create fixtures before tests?
